meaning: adj.漫游的,徘徊的,流浪的,蜿蜒的n.漫游,离题,神志恍惚
examples: I spent the next year just wandering. I wasn't focused.
Our only companion is the wandering albatross, which glides effortlessly and gracefully behind the yacht.
Call back thy poor wandering memory.
What had drawn me to my wandering life, and why was it so hard to relinquish?
My website, Wandering Trader, allows me to offer training to other travellers interested in learning the skill.
